changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE bookings b SET payment_status = CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN 'PAID' WHEN o.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 'REFUNDED' WHEN o.amount_paid IS NOT NULL AND o.amount_paid > 0 AND (o.total IS NULL OR o.amount_paid < o.total) THEN 'PARTIAL' ELSE 'UNPAID' END FROM orders o WHERE o.booking_id = b.id AND COALESCE(b.payment_status, '') <> CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN 'PAID' WHEN o.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 'REFUNDED' WHEN o.amount_paid IS NOT NULL AND o.amount_paid > 0 AND (o.total IS NULL OR o.amount_paid < o.total) THEN 'PARTIAL' ELSE 'UNPAID' END;

changeSet.author: sumicare
